verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — no decomposition channel loaded; missing: []
falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) the USA × post-2022 effect on clean-energy MW added is within the 95% CI of the pre-IRA trend extrapolation (no deployment acceleration), OR (b) US share of global clean-manufacturing capex does not rise above its 2018-2021 mean by at least 5 percentage points by end-2025, OR (c) clean-energy employment is flat or declines relative to total manufacturing employment, OR (d) total tax-credit outlays fall below the original CBO 10-year estimate (suggesting take-up failure). If only the fiscal-cost channel materialises (deficit rises) without deployment / capex / jobs response, classify as "fiscal cost without industrial response."

variables_loaded.name: comparator_clean_manufacturing_capex_share_global
variables_loaded.source: constructed: BloombergNEF / IEA Energy Technology Perspectives — share of global clean-energy manufacturing capex by location (USA, EU, CHN). Manual-drop under data/manual/iea/.

variables_loaded.name: us_post_ira_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for USA from 2022-08 (IRA enactment) onwards; 0 otherwise.

variables_missing.name: log_us_cumulative_clean_energy_tax_credit_outlay_usd
variables_missing.source: constructed: US Treasury / OMB outlay tabulations cross-checked against CBO 2022/2023/2024 reestimates. fred:FYONET (deficit baseline) + Treasury Green Book line items. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: log_us_clean_manufacturing_announced_capex_usd
variables_missing.source: constructed: BEA NIPA private fixed investment in clean-energy manufacturing + DOE LPO loan-guarantee tracker + BloombergNEF announced-capex tracker. Manual-drop under data/manual/derived/. Cross-checks: fred:PNFI (private nonresidential fixed investment) and fred:INDPRO (manufacturing IP).

variables_missing.name: us_post_ira_eligible_subsector_interaction
variables_missing.source: constructed: interaction of post-IRA dummy with subsector eligibility (battery / EV / solar / wind eligible = 1; non-eligible manufacturing = 0). Identifies whether eligible subsectors accelerate relative to non-eligible.

variables_missing.name: china_clean_manufacturing_capex_share
variables_missing.source: constructed: same BloombergNEF / IEA tracker, China share. Used to control for global clean-energy capex cycle independent of IRA.
